title: Low Water at San Carlos Reservoir
summary: Drought and water releases drained the Arizona reservoir to levels that have led to widespread fish deaths.

title: Live coverage: SpaceX to launch 3 Block 2 BlueBird satellites for AST SpaceMobile
summary: The mission is third time SpaceX will launch satellites for AST SpaceMobile and its first of the Block 2 iteration of the BlueBird satellites. Liftoff from pad 40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station is scheduled for 2:39 a.m. EDT (0639 UTC).

title: NASA’s Webb Catches Exoplanet Getting Roasted
summary: One well-done gas giant, coming right up! That’s the latest from researchers analyzing NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope’s observations of HD 80606 b, an exoplanet four times the mass of Jupiter with an extremely elliptical orbit that sweeps close by its Sun-like star. title: Webb & Hubble reveal relic of our galaxy’s formation
summary: Researchers have confirmed a new class of objects within our Milky Way galaxy: survivors called 'bulge fossil fragments.' Terzan 5 is the prototype of these remnants of our galaxy's early formation. Using the NASA/ESA/CSA James Webb Space Telescope and the NASA/ESA Hubble Space Telescopes researchers have shown that Terzan 5 is not a globular star cluster as it was once classified. Instead, it is something much odder and rarer.
